IRON DOME · כִּפַּת בַּרְזֶל

interception success rate — Iron Dome calculates each trajectory and only fires when a populated area is threatened
SPEED ~Mach 1
RANGE 5–45 km
ALT < 10 km
COST $800
A Qassam costs $800 to build; the Tamir interceptor costs $50,000 — this 62:1 cost ratio is itself a strategic weapon
Each Iron Dome battery has a radar, control center, and 3–4 launchers — enough to protect a medium-sized city
10s
